turns.speaker: model_a
turns.content: hello there . how are you ? i got off from creating videos for discovery channel .

turns.speaker: model_b
turns.content: cool ! i watched a video on dc about gravity last week instead of my favorite futurama .

turns.speaker: model_a
turns.content: nice . before this job , i did not have any technological skills . where do you work ?

turns.speaker: model_b
turns.content: i am studying for my masters . fortunately mom lets me live with her .

turns.speaker: model_a
turns.content: great way to save money . do you like the outdoors ? i love it .

turns.speaker: model_b
turns.content: i am studying forestry management . i do not want to be a custodian like mom .

turns.speaker: model_a
turns.content: coolness . i love being one with nature and being savage .

turns.speaker: model_b
turns.content: savage ? do you like death metal ? i know a member of martius .

turns.speaker: model_a
turns.content: i am more into hard rock . who do you know from martius ?

turns.speaker: model_b
turns.content: the bass player . he's the one who introduced me to anime .

turns.speaker: model_a
turns.content: i love anime . my favorite is trinity blood .
